# SecAccessOwnerType

**Type Alias**

A type for flags that enable you to configure ACL ownership.

## Declaration

```swift
typealias SecAccessOwnerType = UInt32
```

## Discussion

See [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/SecAccessOwnerType-values] for the list of possible values.
